subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was perused, but owing to lack of time a brief reply is now being penned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما ملاحظه گردید ولی از عدم فرصت جواب مختصر مرقوم میشود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @education of children; moral education, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
